title: gladiolus flanaganii
intro: Gladiolus flanaganii is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the Flanagan's sword lily or Flanagan's gladiolus. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Gladiolus flanaganii include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions.
